g.text: Nullable, can be Orthodox, Southpaw, etc.
Primary Key, Composite of fighters' names and date
Date when the fight took place
Location where the fight took place
Format of the fight, e.g., number of rounds
Type of the fight, e.g., weight class
Name of the winner, references Fighter(Name)
The last round of the fight
Time when the last round ended
Primary Key, Composite of Fight ID and fighter
The fighter's corner color in this fight, 'R' for Red or 'B' for Blue
